files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class SpeechTranscriberTests: XCTestCase {
+    @MainActor
+    func testEmptySamplesReturnNilWithoutCallingRuntime() async {
+        let runtime = TestWhisperRuntime()
+        let transcriber = SpeechTranscriber(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            whisperRuntime: runtime
+        )
+
+        let result = await transcriber.transcribe(
+            samples: [],
+            modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(result)
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.calls, [])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testUnknownModelReturnsNilWithoutCallingRuntime() async {
+        let runtime = TestWhisperRuntime()
+        let transcriber = SpeechTranscriber(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            whisperRuntime: runtime
+        )
+
+        let result = await transcriber.transcribe(samples: [0.25], modelID: "missing-model")
+
+        XCTAssertNil(result)
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.calls, [])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testWhisperTranscriptionJoinsTrimsAndRemovesArtifacts() async {
+        let runtime = TestWhisperRuntime()
+        runtime.transcriptionSegments = [
+            WhisperSegment(text: "  hello"),
+            WhisperSegment(text: "[NO_SPEECH] world [LAUGHTER]  ")
+        ]
+        let transcriber = SpeechTranscriber(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            whisperRuntime: runtime
+        )
+
+        let result = await transcriber.transcribe(
+            samples: [0.25, 0.5],
+            modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, "hello world")
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.calls, ["transcribe"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.lastAudioSamples, [0.25, 0.5])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testNoLoadedWhisperEngineReturnsNil() async {
+        let runtime = TestWhisperRuntime()
+        runtime.transcriptionSegments = nil
+        let transcriber = SpeechTranscriber(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            whisperRuntime: runtime
+        )
+
+        let result = await transcriber.transcribe(
+            samples: [0.25],
+            modelID: SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertNil(result)
+        XCTAssertEqual(runtime.calls, ["transcribe"])
+    }
+}
+
+private final class TestWhisperRuntime: WhisperRuntimeLoading, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var calls: [String] = []
+    var lastAudioSamples: [Float]?
+    var transcriptionSegments: [WhisperSegment]? = []
+
+    func download(
+        variant: String,
+        downloadBase: URL,
+        progress: @escaping @Sendable (Double) -> Void
+    ) async throws -> URL {
+        fatalError("Unexpected download call")
+    }
+
+    func initialize(_ request: WhisperInitializationRequest) async throws {
+        fatalError("Unexpected initialize call")
+    }
+
+    func transcribe(audioSamples: [Float]) async throws -> [WhisperSegment]? {
+        calls.append("transcribe")
+        lastAudioSamples = audioSamples
+        return transcriptionSegments
+    }
+}
